sad: This feeling is temporary, even if it doesn’t feel like it right now.
I am allowed to feel sad and still be worthy of care.
I am not alone, even if it feels that way.

lonely: I am worthy of connection and meaningful relationships.
There are people who will understand and appreciate me.
I bring value to the lives of others, even if I can’t see it right now.

anxious: I can take this one breath at a time.
I can ground myself in what is real and present.
I am stronger than this wave of anxiety.

stressed: I am allowed to pause and breathe.
I am doing the best I can with what I have.
I can create small moments of calm in my day.

tired: I don’t have to push myself beyond my limits.
Resting now will help me feel stronger later.
Taking care of myself is important and necessary.

angry: I am in control of my actions, even when emotions feel intense.
I can release tension without hurting myself or others.
I am allowed to set boundaries and protect my peace.

happy: Happiness is something I can notice and appreciate.
Good moments are worth remembering and holding onto.
I deserve to enjoy this moment fully.
